song.title: Heart of Worship
song.author: Matt Redman
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D A G When the music fades and all is stripped away . Asus A And I simply come .D A G Longing just to bring something that's of worth . Asus A That will bless Your heart
[P] .Em D A I'll bring You more than a song . Em For a song in itself . D A Is not what You have required .Em D A You search much deeper within, . Em Through the way things appear . D A You're looking into my heart
[C] .D A I'm coming back to the heart of worship . Em D G A D And it's all about You, it's all about You, Jesus . D A I'm sorry, Lord, for the thing I've made it . Em D G A D When it's all about You, it's all about You, Jesus
[V2] King of endless worth, no one could express How much You deserve Though I'm weak and poor, all I have is Yours Every single breath
